deadline: March 7, 2017, by 5:00 PM local time of applicant organization
eligible_applicant_type: Public/State Controlled Institutions of Higher Education
Alaska Native and Native Hawaiian Serving Institutions
Asian American Native American Pacific Islander Serving Institutions (AANAPISIs)
geographic_restrictions: Domestic institutions located in the United States and its territories
project_area: Health sciences research with a focus on minority health and health disparities, including basic biomedical, behavioral, and clinical research
demographic_requirements: Institutions must have a historical and current mission to educate students from underrepresented backgrounds (e.g., racial/ethnic minorities, persons with disabilities) and/or provide clinical services to medically underserved communities. Applicants must demonstrate a track record of recruiting, training, and graduating underrepresented students or serving underserved populations.
eligibility_summary: Eligible institutions must be domestic higher education institutions offering doctorate degrees in health professions or health-related sciences, with a commitment to educating underrepresented students or serving medically underserved communities. Only one application per institution is allowed. Foreign institutions and components are not eligible.
